mapper.insert: insert into tbl_auction ( work_id, seller_id, asking_price, starting_price, bid_increment, current_price, bid_count, fee_rate, fee_amount, settlement_amount, deadline_hours, started_at, closing_at, cancel_threshold, status ) values ( #{workId}, #{sellerId}, #{askingPrice}, #{startingPrice}, #{bidIncrement}, #{currentPrice}, #{bidCount}, #{feeRate}, #{feeAmount}, #{settlementAmount}, #{deadlineHours}, #{startedAt}, #{closingAt}, #{cancelThreshold}, #{status} )
mapper.select: select a.id, a.work_id, w.title as work_title, wf.file_url as work_thumbnail, a.seller_id, m.nickname as seller_nickname, a.asking_price, a.starting_price, a.current_price, a.bid_count, a.bid_increment, a.estimate_low, a.estimate_high, a.fee_rate, a.deadline_hours, a.started_at, a.closing_at, a.status, a.winner_id, a.final_price, false as is_wishlisted, a.created_datetime from tbl_auction a join tbl_work w on a.work_id = w.id join tbl_member m on a.seller_id = m.id left join tbl_work_file wf on wf.work_id = a.work_id and wf.sort_order = 0 where a.work_id = #{workId} and a.status = 'ACTIVE' order by a.created_datetime desc, a.id desc limit 1

SELECT a.id, a.work_id, w.title AS work_title, wf.file_url AS work_thumbnail, a.seller_id, m.nickname AS seller_nickname, a.asking_price, a.starting_price, a.current_price, a.bid_count, a.bid_increment, a.estimate_low, a.estimate_high, a.fee_rate, a.deadline_hours, a.started_at, a.closing_at, a.status, a.winner_id, a.final_price, CASE WHEN aw.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS is_wishlisted, a.created_datetime FROM tbl_auction a JOIN tbl_work w ON a.work_id = w.id JOIN tbl_member m ON a.seller_id = m.id LEFT JOIN tbl_work_file wf ON wf.work_id = a.work_id AND wf.sort_order = 0 LEFT JOIN tbl_auction_wishlist aw ON aw.auction_id = a.id AND aw.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE a.id = #{auctionId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_auction SET current_price = #{currentPrice}, bid_count = #{bidCount}, updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{auctionId}
UPDATE tbl_auction SET status = #{status}, updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{auctionId}
UPDATE tbl_auction SET winner_id = #{winnerId}, final_price = #{finalPrice}, status = 'SOLD', updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{auctionId}
mapper.select: SELECT aw.id, 'AUCTION' AS "targetType", aw.auction_id AS "targetId", aw.created_datetime AS "createdDatetime", w.title AS "title", (SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = a.work_id AND wf.sort_order = 0 LIMIT 1) AS "thumbnail" FROM tbl_auction_wishlist aw JOIN tbl_auction a ON aw.auction_id = a.id JOIN tbl_work w ON a.work_id = w.id WHERE aw.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY aw.created_datetime DESC
